variants: Eduardo Merino has established himself as an influential figure in steam technology. He currently resides in Pebblefern Crossing and originally hails from Lemonvale Quarter. His inventive work, the Underleaf Query Matrix, earned him the prestigious Empress Quill Medallion, recognizing his significant contributions in the field. As an active member of the Vaporveil Steamwrights, Eduardo engages with like-minded individuals who share his passion for steam-related inventions.
